en.extract:
The olive-flanked ground robin (Dessonornis anomalus), also known as the olive-flanked robin-chat, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.  It is found in Malawi, and Mozambique.  Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests.

The '''olive-flanked ground robin''' ('''''Dessonornis anomalus'''''), also known as the '''olive-flanked robin-chat''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].  It is found in [[Malawi]], and [[Mozambique]].  Its natural [[habitat]] is tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
